properties.responsibility: Provides a valid source recording; reviews and corrects the generated protocol to ensure accuracy before distribution.
properties.authority: Upload video recordings; view own transcripts and protocols; edit own protocols in the Markdown editor; export own protocols to PDF; delete own recordings and derived artifacts.
properties.name: Author
properties.description: The person who uploaded a meeting recording and owns the resulting transcript and protocol. The primary - and at MVP the only - active human role.

properties.assumption_note: No authentication or sharing mechanism exists at MVP. Recorded for completeness and future multi-user scope; no distinct system behavior today.
properties.responsibility: Validates decisions and action items from an attendee perspective.
properties.authority: View protocols shared with them; annotate or comment on protocol content (future).
properties.name: Reviewer
properties.description: A meeting participant (typically the organizer, STK-02) who reads/annotates a protocol produced by another person. No technical distinction from Author at MVP.
